middleware.description: Guards tenant-plane marketing routes that expose marketing data. Refuses non-owner / non-admin / non-marketing-role callers with 403 MARKETING_INSUFFICIENT_ROLE. Not a consent-gate for the DATA (that's per-event via ConsentGate); this middleware gates VIEW ACCESS to the marketing surface based on role. Distinct from entitlement.enforce:marketing_capture which gates on tenant tier.

consumed.note: Applied per-route with the specific entitlement key (marketing_capture for base surface, marketing_advanced_providers for advanced provider routes, marketing_roas_report for /roas, marketing_dead_letter_replay for /dead-letters/{id}/replay).
The permission-based authorize middleware wraps the ability checks defined in policies.json + permissions.json. Route-level `permission` metadata resolves through this middleware.

Runs on every tenant-plane request to snapshot UTM + click IDs into the request-scoped AttributionContext. When a domain event later triggers MarketingEventCapturer, the AttributionResolver reads from this context. Marketing does NOT own this middleware — it's owned by the attribution module — but the marketing capture path depends on it being applied earlier in the chain.
